---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new peripheral, CPU feature, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Aryan16544
---

## Feature Summary
What feature or improvement would you like to see?

## Motivation
Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation
If you have ideas on how to implement it, describe them here.
(e.g., new SoC peripheral at address `0x5000_0000`, AXI-Lite slave interface)

## Additional Context
Links to RISC-V specifications, reference implementations, or related datasheets.
